title: Canada’s 24 Sussex Drive Is a Dump. Mark Carney Is Going to Fix It Up.
summary_full: The prime minister’s official residence in Ottawa, in disrepair and vacant for more than a decade, has become the country’s most prominent home renovation project.
summary_public: The prime minister’s official residence in Ottawa, in disrepair and vacant for more than a decade, has become the country’s most prominent home renovation project.
